title: One hospitalization and forty-five new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta July 2-5
summary: On July 2, YKHC reports thirty-one cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. New COVID-19 Cases The 31 residents are in: Akiachak (2) Bethel (8) Kipnuk (1) Kotlik (6) Marshall (10) Mountain Village (1) Napakiak (2) Quinhagak (1) — On July 3, YKHC reports two new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. title: Getting US Arctic Security Right
summary: There are at least three different levels of US' Arctic security policy, which must be unpacked as the US is gearing up its Arctic engagement. The post Getting US Arctic Security Right appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
